name: Bug Bite
effect: Biting. Randomly gain the effects of a Berry from the target's inventory. If the berry would have no immediate effect on the User it remains 'active' until its activation conditions are met (only one berry can be active at a time). The individual selected berry cannot be consumed by the Foe until after the end of their next turn and is removed from selection for subsequent Bug Bites.
description: The Pokemon nibbles its foe. If it finds something tasty, it will eat it in an instant; it might even try to eat almost anything.
